channel.title: ながら日経 Vocabulary Tracker
channel.description: Daily Japanese learning chunks, romaji, and translations from the latest Nagara Nikkei podcast titles.

item.title: 7月24日（金）動き出した大型鉄道プロジェクト〜with NIKKEI - July 24th (Friday): The large-scale railway project got underway ~ with NIKKEI

item.description:

Vocabulary Breakdown:

Japanese Romaji English Meaning
7月24日 Shichigatsu nijūyokka July 24th
（金） (Kin) (Friday)
動き出した Ugokidashita started to move / got underway
大型 Ōgata large-scale
鉄道 Tetsudō railway
プロジェクト Purojekuto project
〜 〜 ~ (tilde, often used as a separator or for emphasis)
with NIKKEI with NIKKEI with NIKKEI

item.title: 7月24日（金）監査法人の仰星 三優合併 3年半ぶり大型再編、PayPayとセブンが顧客データ統合 - July 24 (Friday) Merger of Audit Firms Gyosei and Sanyu: First Large-Scale Reorganization in Three and a Half Years; PayPay and Seven to Integrate Customer Data
item.guid: 7月24日（金）監査法人の仰星 三優合併 3年半ぶり大型再編、PayPayとセブンが顧客データ統合
item.description:
English Title: July 24 (Friday) Merger of Audit Firms Gyosei and Sanyu: First Large-Scale Reorganization in Three and a Half Years; PayPay and Seven to Integrate Customer Data

Vocabulary Breakdown:

Japanese Romaji English Meaning
7月24日 shichigatsu nijūyokka July 24th
（金） kin Friday
監査法人 kansa hōjin audit corporation / audit firm
の no of / 's
仰星 gyōsei Gyosei (name of an audit firm)
三優 san'yū Sanyu (name of an audit firm)
合併 gappei merger / consolidation
3年半ぶり sannen han buri for the first time in three and a half years
大型再編 ōgata saihen large-scale reorganization
PayPay peipei PayPay (a Japanese mobile payment service)
と to and
セブン sebun Seven (referring to Seven-Eleven / Seven & i Holdings)
が ga subject marker
顧客データ kokyaku dēta customer data
統合 tōgō integration / unification

item.title: 7月23日（木）世界の社債発行 1~6月に過去最大580兆円、ストーカー加害者にGPS装着案 被害者に接近通知 - July 23rd (Thursday): Global corporate bond issuance hits record 580 trillion yen in Jan-June; proposal to attach GPS to stalker perpetrators, notifying victims of proximity.
item.guid: 7月23日（木）世界の社債発行 1~6月に過去最大580兆円、ストーカー加害者にGPS装着案 被害者に接近通知

Japanese Romaji English Meaning
7月23日 Shichigatsu Nijū-san-nichi July 23rd
（木） (Moku) (Thursday)

社債発行 Shasai Hakkō corporate bond issuance
1~6月に Ichi-gatsu kara Roku-gatsu ni in January-June

580兆円 Gohyaku Hachijū Chō-en 580 trillion yen
、 , ,

加害者に Kagaisha ni to perpetrators / to assailants

item.title: 7月22日（水）M&A「のれん」償却維持で決着 会計基準機構、ゴールドマンCOO 日本経済「最大のリスクは円安」 - July 22 (Wed) - Settlement Reached to Maintain M&A 'Goodwill' Amortization by Accounting Standards Board; Goldman COO: 'The Biggest Risk' to the Japanese Economy is the Weak Yen

Japanese Romaji English Meaning
7月22日（水） shichigatsu nijūnichi (sui) July 22nd (Wednesday)
M&A emu ando ē M&A (Mergers and Acquisitions)
「のれん」 noren goodwill (intangible asset value in accounting)
償却維持で決着 shōkyaku iji de ketchaku settled on maintaining amortization
会計基準機構 kaikei kijun kikō accounting standards board / organization
ゴールドマンCOO gōrudoman shī-ō-ō Goldman (Sachs) COO

国際標準化 kokusai hyōjunka international standardization
の no possessive particle (of)
司令塔 shireitō control tower / nerve center

EU ī-yū EU (European Union)
アリババ aribaba Alibaba

item.title: 7月19日（日）地銀 信金の与信管理 金融庁が点検へ、過熱AI相場「期待修正」でマネー逆流 - July 19 (Sun): Financial Services Agency to inspect credit management of regional and shinkin banks; money flows reverse due to 'expectation adjustments' in the overheated AI market.
item.guid: 7月19日（日）地銀 信金の与信管理 金融庁が点検へ、過熱AI相場「期待修正」でマネー逆流
item.description:
English Title: July 19 (Sun): Financial Services Agency to inspect credit management of regional and shinkin banks; money flows reverse due to 'expectation adjustments' in the overheated AI market.

Vocabulary Breakdown:

Japanese Romaji English Meaning
7月19日（日） shichigatsu jūkyūnichi (nichiyōbi) July 19th (Sunday)
地銀 chigin regional banks (short for 地方銀行 - chihō ginkō)
信金 shinkin shinkin banks / credit unions (short for 信用金庫 - shinyō kinko)
の no possessive particle (of)
与信管理 yoshin kanri credit management / credit control
金融庁 kin'yūchō Financial Services Agency (FSA)
が ga subject marker particle
点検へ tenken he moving to inspect / toward inspection
過熱 kanetsu overheating
AI相場 ēai sōba AI market
「期待修正」 kitai shūsei "correction of expectations" / "adjustment of expectations"
で de due to / because of
マネー manē money
逆流 gyakuryū backflow / reverse flow

下げ幅 sagehaba decline width / drop margin
歴代5位 rekidai goi 5th largest in history

item.title: 7月9日（木）JCB・りそながバスで「手ぶら決済」 タッチ不要、骨太の方針原案 金融政策で文言修正 - July 9 (Thursday): JCB and Resona trial 'hands-free payment' on buses with no touch required; Draft of the 'Big-Boned' (Basic) Policy; Wording revised in monetary policy
item.guid: 7月9日（木）JCB・りそながバスで「手ぶら決済」 タッチ不要、骨太の方針原案 金融政策で文言修正
item.description:
English Title: July 9 (Thursday): JCB and Resona trial 'hands-free payment' on buses with no touch required; Draft of the 'Big-Boned' (Basic) Policy; Wording revised in monetary policy

Vocabulary Breakdown:

Japanese Romaji English Meaning
7月9日（木） shichigatsu kokonoka (mokuyōbi) July 9th (Thursday)
JCB・りそな jē-shī-bī, risona JCB and Resona (Japanese financial institutions)
が ga subject marker particle
バスで basu de on the bus / by bus
「手ぶら決済」 "tebura kessai" "hands-free payment" (empty-handed payment)
タッチ不要 tatchi fuyō no touch required
骨太の方針原案 honebuto no hōshin gen'an draft of the basic policies for economic and fiscal management (literally 'big-boned policy draft')
